max_sentences: 3
topic: how to record a hit or miss verdict after a delegation
facts:
- delegate-feedback.sh hit, or miss with a short reason, appends a feedback row to metrics.jsonl
- the verdict is keyed by ref_ts to the delegate event
- the --source agent flag tags it as the agent's own usage judgment, kept out of the human taste-judgment tier
- the script refuses if the most recent delegate row is older than five minutes unless you pass --ts
